debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
h : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
hp : p % 4 = 1
⊢ ∃ a b, a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = p

failed_attempts:
haveI : Fact (p % 4 ≠ 3) := ⟨by omega⟩
  exact Nat.Prime.sq_add_sq h.out (by omega)

have := Nat.Prime.eq_two_or_odd h.out
  have hp' : p ≠ 2 := by
    intro heq
    simp [heq] at hp
  have hodd : Odd p := this.resolve_left hp'
  have : p % 4 ≠ 3 := by omega
  have hsum := ZMod.isSquare_neg_one_iff h.out |>.mpr (by omega : p % 4 ≠ 3)
  obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ := hsum
  have := Nat.Prime.sum_two_squares_of_nat_prime_of_eq_one_mod_four h.out hp
  exact this

have := Nat.Prime.sq_add_sq h.out (by omega : p % 4 ≠ 3)
  obtain ⟨a, b, hab⟩ := this
  exact ⟨a.natAbs, b.natAbs, by simp [sq_abs] at hab ⊢; omega⟩

have := Nat.Prime.eq_two_or_odd h.out
  have hp' : p ≡ 1 [MOD 4] := hp
  have : Odd p := by
    rcases this with rfl | hodd
    · simp at hp
    · exact hodd
  have := ZMod.isSquare_neg_one_iff.mpr (Or.inr ⟨this, hp'⟩)
  exact Nat.Prime.sq_add_sq h.out this

have : p % 4 ≠ 3 := by omega
  exact Nat.Prime.sq_add_sq h.out this
exact Nat.Prime.sq_add_sq' h.out (by omega : p % 4 ≠ 3)

have := Nat.Prime.eq_two_or_odd h.out
  have hp' : p ≡ 1 [MOD 4] := hp
  have : Odd p := by
    rcases this with rfl | hodd
    · simp at hp
    · exact hodd
  rw [Nat.Prime.sum_two_squares_iff h.out]
  rw [ZMod.isSquare_neg_one_iff]
  intro q hq hqp
  have hq4 : q % 4 ≠ 3 := by
    intro hq3
    have : p % 4 = 3 := by
      have hdvd : q ∣ p := hqp
      have := Nat.Prime.eq_one_or_self_of_prime_of_dvd h.out q hq hdvd
      rcases this with rfl | rfl
      · simp at hq3
      · exact hq3
    omega
  omega

have := Nat.Prime.eq_two_or_odd h.out
  have hp' : p ≠ 2 := by
    intro h2
    rw [h2] at hp
    norm_num at hp
  have hodd : Odd p := this.resolve_left hp'
  have : p % 4 = 1 ∨ p % 4 = 3 := by omega
  rcases this with h1 | h3
  · -- p ≡ 1 (mod 4)
    have : ∃ a b : ℤ, a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = p := by
      have := ZMod.isSquare_neg_one_iff.mpr (Or.inr ⟨by linarith [h.out.two_le], hp⟩)
      exact Nat.Prime.sq_add_sq h.out this
    obtain ⟨a, b, hab⟩ := this
    use a.natAbs, b.natAbs
    simp only [← Int.natAbs_sq, ← Int.natCast_add, ← Int.natCast_pow] at hab ⊢
    omega
  · exfalso
    rw [h3] at hp
